privileged_info_summary: The task is fully synthetic, created entirely by setup_task.sh which generates a Git repository with merge conflicts. The project 'commons-inventory' is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/commons-inventory and contains four files: Product.java, InventoryManager.java, InventoryUtils.java, and pom.xml. The conflict resolution requires keeping code from both the main and feature/discount-system branches: Product.java must retain both 'category' (from main) and 'discountPercent' (from feature) fields; InventoryManager.java must have the Streams refactoring with stream() and mapToDouble() (from main) AND the calculateDiscountedTotal() method (from feature); InventoryUtils.java must include both formatCurrency() and calculateBulkDiscount() methods; and pom.xml must contain both commons-lang3 and commons-math3 dependencies.
